svg.title: Closet one memory fragment (apartment four) - carefully categorized
svg.desc: Looking straight into a tightly framed closet wall: three shelves stack from top to bottom, with a row of fabric storage bins along the floor. The top shelf holds three small labeled tins. The middle shelf holds three tidy stacks of folded clothing in cream, sage, and slate, plus a lidded fabric cube on the right. The bottom shelf holds two large labeled storage boxes side by side. The floor row has four small fabric bins, each in a different muted color. A soft warm light from above evens out the entire wall. Every label is hand-tagged. Nothing is out of alignment.
